title: BlackRock is raising $12bn to build Meta a data centre it will own, lend to, and rent out
summary: Meta also just agreed to lease a project in Shippingport, Pennsylvania, run by Aligned, the developer BlackRock bought for $40bn . BlackRock is betting AI demand, and Meta’s rent, hold long enough to pay it back.
caption: output/2026-07-22/blackrock-is-raising-12bn-to-build-meta-a-data-centre-it-will-own-lend.txt
